AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description: This app logs and queries workout logs and provides daily exercise suggestions based on history. Operational Patterns: - Use 'logWorkout' to log workouts. - Use 'getWorkoutsForRange' to retrieve logged workouts for a specific period. - Use 'suggestWorkout' to recommend today's workout. Constraints: - Queries and suggestions depend on local historical log data.
